title: blumea hirsuta
intro: Blumea hirsuta, also known as coarse fingered or hairy blumea, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Blumea hirsuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Blumea hirsuta include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
